creator: ac199@hwcn.org
text:
>                           Problem Report ports/5106
>                                       
>   Perl5 is not listed as an install option for freeBSD 2.2.5-RELEASE
[...]
>   Description
>          
>
>The perl5 language does not seem to be available through the
>sysinstall installation program.  I can't find it there anywhere:

This is, of course, because it is not in the packages/INDEX file (I
presume it was on the.  Our valiant and fearless release engineer would be
wise to note that, as well the packages/.message file is rather out of
date (it refers to 2.2.2-RELEASE).  And shouldn't netscape4-navigator be
removed from ports/LEGAL?  Vanilla?!  That would be your doing!  :)
